Bloque Metro de las AUC.description: Colombian paramilitary front operating primarily in Antioquia department, linked to the ACCU and later the AUC. Founded in 1996 by Carlos Mauricio García Fernández (alias 'Rodrigo Doble Cero'), it operated in 45 municipalities until its dissolution in 2004. The group fought leftist guerrillas and was involved in drug trafficking and counterinsurgency.

descriptions: Bloque Metro listed as enemy of AUC in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP , ELN , Disidencias del EPL , ACC , Bloque Metro (Disidencia de AUC)

Triads.description: Triads are Chinese transnational organized crime syndicates based in Greater China with outposts worldwide. Originating from 18th-century secret societies aimed at overthrowing the Qing dynasty, they evolved into criminal organizations involved in drug trafficking, human trafficking, extortion, and other illegal activities. Modern triads operate primarily from Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan, with connections to mainland Chinese criminal groups.

descriptions: The American Mafia has done business with the Chinese triads.
edges.evidence_quote: has at various times done business with the Irish Mob , Jewish-American organized crime , the Japanese yakuza , Indian mafia , the Russian mafia , Thief in law and Post-Soviet Organized crime groups, the Chinese triads , Chinese Tongs and Asian street gangs, Motorcycle Gangs and numerous White, Black and Hispanic prison and street gangs.

descriptions: The Brodie Gang is at war with the local Triads.
edges.evidence_quote: This incarnation is led by a man named Tam Brodie and is at war with the local Triads.

descriptions: Camorra and Chinese Triads cooperate in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: there is a close relationship between the Triads and the Camorra, and the port of Naples is the most important landing point of the trades managed by the Chinese groups in cooperation with the Camorra.

descriptions: Camorra cooperates with Triads in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: esiste una stretta relazione tra le triadi e la Camorra e il porto di Napoli è il punto di approdo più importante delle attività gestite dai gruppi cinesi in cooperazione con la camorra.

descriptions: Fuqing Gang collaborated with Triads in underground casinos and drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Hong Kong media reports indicated that the Fuqing Gang collaborated with the Japanese Yakuza , the American Mafia , and Triads operating in mainland China in the operation of underground casinos and the trafficking of illegal drugs in East Asia.

descriptions: Fujianese organized crime is allied with Triad.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Triad ( Hong Kong ) , Big Circle Gang , Yakuza ( Japan ) , Yamaguchi-gumi , American Mafia , Chinese Communist Party , Hong Kong Federation of Trade Unions , Grand Alliance for Safeguarding Hong Kong

descriptions: Text notes similar founding myths for Chinese Triads, implying a parallel but not a direct relationship.

descriptions: Hongmen groups turned to crime and gave birth to the modern Triads.
edges.evidence_quote: When some Hongmen groups based within China could no longer rely on donations from sympathetic locals; being unable to resume normal civilian lives after years of hiding, they turned to illegal activities – thus giving birth to the modern Triads.

descriptions: Chinese gangs allied with Casalesi clan in industrial waste export scheme.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2017, investigators uncovered a plan between the Camorra and Chinese gangs: these exported industrial waste from Italy to China which guaranteed revenues of millions of euros for both organizations. Industrial waste left Prato and arrived in Hong Kong. Among the clans involved in this alliance were the Casalesi clan, the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan.

'Ndrina Ursino.description: The Ursino are a powerful 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioiosa Jonica, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Aquino and Cordì clans and have settlements in Turin, Liguria, France, Spain, and Canada, with connections to Apulian organized crime. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and murder, including the 1983 assassination of magistrate Bruno Caccia. Their existence was judicially confirmed in 2014 following Operation Mistero.

descriptions: The Ursino 'ndrina is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: In February 2014, both FBI and Italian Police joint operation named New Bridge, intercepted the transatlantic network of U.S. and Italian crime families. The raid targeted the Gambino and Bonanno families in the U.S. while in Italy, it targeted the Ursino 'ndrina from Gioiosa Jonica.

descriptions: Ursino 'ndrina is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Commisso 'ndrina , Aquino 'ndrina, Ursino 'ndrina

descriptions: Ursino listed as ally of Costa in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati - Ursino

descriptions: Pelle and Ursino 'ndrine were targeted together in an operation against international drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: Operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, ... degli Ursino

descriptions: Romeo and Ursino were both targeted in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo, detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Strangio and Ursino were targeted together in the same operation, suggesting cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione European 'ndrangheta connection ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari, dei Romeo detti Stacchi, degli Cua-Ietto, degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì were arrested alongside Barbaro-Papalia affiliates in the same drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 gennaio 2014 si conclude a Milano , l'operazione “Tamburo”, iniziata nel 2009 che ha portato all'arresto per traffico di droga di 13 persone, presunte affiliate ai Mancuso , Barbaro - Papalia e agli Ursino- Macrì

descriptions: The Belfiore act as referents for the Ursino in Turin.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel capoluogo torinese i loro referenti sono i Belfiore

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì were arrested alongside Bruzzese affiliates in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2016 si conclude l'operazione “Tipographic” che porta all'arresto di 36 persone presunte affiliate agli Ursino-Macrì e agli Jerinò di Gioiosa Jonica , ai Rumbo-Galea-Figliomeni di Siderno , ai Bruzzese di Grotteria e ai Mazzaferro di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: The Ursino are allied with the Cordì.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino sono una potente 'ndrina di Gioiosa Jonica , alleata degli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica e dei Cordì di Locri

descriptions: The Ursino were targeted alongside the Cua-Ietto in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione “European 'ndrangheta connection” (ex Pollino ) ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: Ursino and Ierinò were opposing sides in the Seconda faida di Gioiosa Jonica.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida di Gioiosa Jonica, stavolta fra gli Ursino e gli Ierinò , alla fine degli anni '80.

descriptions: The Ursino and Jerinò were in a feud from 1987 to 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: Tra il 1987 e il 1991, come in molti altri paesi calabresi , scoppia una faida a Gioiosa Jonica fra gli Ursino e gli Jerinò

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì and Jerinò were arrested together in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2016 si conclude l'operazione “Tipographic” che porta all'arresto di 36 persone presunte affiliate agli Ursino-Macrì e agli Jerinò di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: The Ursino sided with the Imerti-Condello-Serraino-Di Giovine-Rosmini faction in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino nella seconda guerra di 'Ndrangheta si schierarono insieme ai Macrì con la fazione Imerti - Condello - Serraino - Di Giovine - Rosmini

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì were arrested alongside Mancuso affiliates in the same drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 14 gennaio 2014 si conclude a Milano , l'operazione “Tamburo”, iniziata nel 2009 che ha portato all'arresto per traffico di droga di 13 persone, presunte affiliate ai Mancuso , Barbaro - Papalia e agli Ursino- Macrì

descriptions: The Ursino worked together with the Mazzaferro and Macrì on the construction of the Port of Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del Porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro e ai Macrì

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì were arrested alongside Mazzaferro affiliates in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2016 si conclude l'operazione “Tipographic” che porta all'arresto di 36 persone presunte affiliate agli Ursino-Macrì e agli Jerinò di Gioiosa Jonica , ai Rumbo-Galea-Figliomeni di Siderno , ai Bruzzese di Grotteria e ai Mazzaferro di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: The Ursino were targeted alongside the Pelle-Vottari in the same international drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 dicembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione “European 'ndrangheta connection” (ex Pollino ) ... che colpisce alcuni esponenti dei Pelle-Vottari , dei Romeo detti Stacchi , degli Cua-Ietto , degli Ursino e dei Nirta-Strangio

descriptions: The Ursino were targeted alongside the Romeo (Stacchi) in the same operation.

descriptions: Members of Ursino-Macrì were arrested alongside Rumbo-Galea-Figliomeni affiliates in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 marzo 2016 si conclude l'operazione “Tipographic” che porta all'arresto di 36 persone presunte affiliate agli Ursino-Macrì e agli Jerinò di Gioiosa Jonica , ai Rumbo-Galea-Figliomeni di Siderno

descriptions: A Gambino associate conspired with a member of the Ursino clan to set up a drug network.
edges.evidence_quote: US Attorney Loretta Lynch singled out Gambino family associate Franco Lupoi as the linchpin of the operation, accusing him of conspiring with his father-in-law, Nicola Antonio Simonetta, a member of the Ursino clan, to set up the network.

descriptions: Sackett St Boys was one of the constituent gangs that formed the South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Joy Boys, meaning the Joy Boys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Schoolcraft Boys, meaning the Schoolcraft Boys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 and Grave Yard Gangster Crips are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: Venice 13 has rivalry with Grave Yard Gangsta Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: As well as 18th Street gang (particularly the 106th St in Inglewood), as well as the Grave Yard Gangsta Crips in Santa Monica and Culver City 13 in the Mar Vista neighborhood.

Kodo-kai.description: The Kodo-kai is a yakuza criminal organization based in Nagoya, Japan, and a secondary organization of the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi. Founded in 1984 by Shinobu Tsukasa, it has an estimated membership of 4,000 and operates in at least 18 prefectures. Known as a 'financial mafia,' it engages in banking, investment banking, real estate, securities, and show business. The National Police Agency considers it a mafia-like or terrorist organization due to its defiant attitude toward police.

descriptions: Kodo-kai succeeded Hirota-gumi after its disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: Shinobu Tsukasa formed the Kodo-kai as the successor to the Hirota-gumi in 1984 after the Hirota-gumi disbanded

descriptions: Fukushima Rengo is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Kodo-kai forced Goto-gumi's founder into retirement, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Goto began disappearing from the yakuza scene in 2008 after allegedly being forced into retirement by the Kobe headquarters' ruling faction led by Kiyoshi Takayama of the Kodo-kai.

descriptions: Kodo-kai is the successor to Hirota-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the disbanding of the Hirota-gumi, he founded the Kodo-kai with Kiyoshi Takayama among others in 1984 as the successor to the Hirota-gumi.

descriptions: Jido-kai is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

edges.evidence_quote: Under Shinoda and his long-term partner Takayama, the Kodo-kai was a successful branch of the Yamaguchi-Gumi

descriptions: Kodo-kai is compared to Yamaken-gumi as a fellow affiliate, but no direct relationship is stated.

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a ruling affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi.

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a sub-group of Yamaguchi-gumi, with its chief being the number two in Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Yamaguchi-gumi's number two and Kodo-kai chief Kiyoshi Takayama was arrested in late 2010.

descriptions: Kodo-kai's boss became wakagashira of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Kiyoshi Takayama, kumichō of the Kodo-kai, was elected as wakagashira

descriptions: Both were affiliates of Yamaguchi-gumi, with Yamaken-gumi being larger.
edges.evidence_quote: It was the largest affiliate, followed by the Nagoya -based Kodo-kai , of the largest known yakuza syndicate in Japan, the Yamaguchi-gumi until 2015.

Red Devils Motorcycle Club.description: The Red Devils Motorcycle Club is an international 1% outlaw motorcycle club and the principal support club of the Hells Angels. Founded in Karlstad, Sweden in 2001, it has chapters in nearly 20 countries. The club is known for extreme violence and acts as a 'shock troop' protecting Hells Angels' drug and gun trafficking networks. It has been involved in numerous disputes with law enforcement and rival gangs worldwide.

descriptions: Bandidos consider Red Devils as rivals in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: while their rivals include the Comancheros , Finks , Gypsy Jokers , Hells Angels , Mongols , Notorious , Rebels and Red Devils

descriptions: Red Devils MC is listed as a rival of Bandidos in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1930, the Castellammarese War started between Masseria and Salvatore Maranzano, the new leader of Cola Schirò's Castellammarese gang, for control of Italian-American organized crime in New York.

Shapiro Brothers.description: The Shapiro Brothers were a group of Jewish-American mobsters from New York City, based in Williamsburg, who led a faction in the garment industry. They were involved in a violent conflict with Jacob 'Gurrah' Shapiro and Louis 'Lepke' Buchalter in 1931. Irving and Meyer were killed by the Amberg brothers in 1931, and Willie was killed by Murder, Inc. in 1934. Their murders were later used to convict Buchalter and others.

descriptions: Murder, Inc. members killed Willie Shapiro on orders from Buchalter, indicating a conflict relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: On orders from Buchalter, Willie was killed by Murder, Inc. members Martin "Bugsy" Goldstein and Abe "Kid Twist" Reles

descriptions: 400 Mawozo aligned with G-Pèp in 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2022, it aligned itself with "G-Pèp" after its leader was extradited to the United States.

'Ndrina Araniti.description: The 'Ndrina Araniti is a historical and powerful 'Ndrangheta clan based in Sambatello, Reggio Calabria, Italy. According to the 'Sistema Reggio' operation, it is one of five 'ndrine with absolute monopoly over commercial and economic activities in Reggio Calabria. The clan has been active for over 50 years and has been involved in extortion, usury, money laundering, and other crimes. Members have been arrested in various operations, including 'Bless' in 2007 and 'Martingala' and 'Vello d'oro' in 2018.

descriptions: The 'Ndrina Araniti is a clan of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Araniti è una storica e potente cosca malavitosa della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Members of both 'ndrine were arrested in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 luglio 2007 con l'operazione "Bless" vengono arrestate 24 persone tra cui esponenti della cosca Condello.

descriptions: Members of these three 'ndrine were targeted together in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 febbraio 2018 si concludono le operazioni "Martingala" e "Vello d'oro" ... nei confronti di presunti affiliati ai Nirta (Scalzone), degli Araniti e dei Piromalli

descriptions: Members of these three 'ndrine were targeted together in the same police operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 febbraio 2018 si concludono le operazioni "Martingala" e "Vello d'oro" ... nei confronti di presunti affiliati ai Nirta (Scalzone), degli Araniti e dei Piromalli

descriptions: Barreca 'ndrina had a cooperative relationship with Araniti 'ndrina, including baptism and rank conferral.
edges.evidence_quote: Barreca had his son baptized by the capobastone of the Araniti 'ndrina, Santo Araniti. In 1979, Barreca received the "santista" rank from Araniti himself.

descriptions: Piromalli, Nirta (Scalzone), and Araniti cooperated in extortion and money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 19 febbraio 2018 si concludono le operazioni Martingala e Vello d'oro ... nei confronti di presunti affiliati ai Nirta (Scalzone) , degli Araniti e dei Piromalli
